component.name: Projectum
component.summary: Track the projects, playlists, tasks and notes in a folder

description.p: Projectum is a keyboard-first desktop tracker. Point it at a folder and every subfolder becomes a project you can mark done and tested, tag with colors, annotate with live-rendered Markdown, pin, and reorder.

The same window tracks YouTube playlists (titles, durations, watched state and per-video notes), keeps a to-do list, a notebook of Markdown notes, and a calendar that draws anything linked to a date. A command palette searches across all of it.
Everything for a folder is stored in a single, human-readable JSON file inside it — no servers, no accounts, no telemetry. Features include:

ul.li: 19 readable, distinctive themes plus any installed font
Per-project git status, size, and quick-actions (open folder / terminal / editor)
Smooth scrolling and animated, frameless UI

screenshot.caption: Projects view with live-rendered Markdown notes
Calendar: anything linked to a date, drawn as bars across the weeks
YouTube playlists with per-video watched state and notes
